Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Estyr Six]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Estyr Six defeated Nakothi alongside the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Estyr Six was a hero of the early Empire and her journal mentions prisons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Estyr Six served as an interim Head of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The inimitable Estyr Six provided testimony regarding the Handmaidens of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — The Estyr Six flew over the ranks of a thousand Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Estyr Six is a potential Empress of the Aurelian Empire.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr Six is a figure who would admire the spirit of a Champion.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr Six is the leader of the Regents and described as the most terrifying woman in history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Estyr Six is a group whose journals contain quotes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr Six is a person who can get involved in conflicts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Estyr Six is a companion of Jorin Maze-walker.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Estyr Six is a ruler who lacks the will to rule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Estyr Six was born Estyr Fourteen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Estyr Six's Vessels can feel rage and fury.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Jorin compares the way people speak to Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The accomplishments of the Estyr Six have been written about by poets and historians for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Estyr Six spoke five hundred years ago.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Estyr Six stated hundreds of years ago that if you are not giving orders, you are not in charge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Estyr Six has the ability to find and kill Calder even if he hides in a bunker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Estyr Six is a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr Six is a Regent and a statuesque woman with long blonde hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr Six has three reptilian skulls floating around her head which are the Vessels that make her the strongest Soulbound in history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr Six is part of an ancient arrangement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr Six is fighting against General Teach and Baldezar Kern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr Six is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Estyr Six is subject to the Emperor's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Estyr Six were among the first generation of Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Calder has felt the force of will projected by Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Estyr Six accused Calder of collaborating with Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr Six has blonde hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr Six has a high weight of Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr Six has three Hydra skulls floating around her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Estyr Six can use an invisible hand to seize a person's throat.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Estyr Six is the Emperor's partner in rebellion and uses power involving hydra skulls to stay aloft.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Estyr Six is described as an unstoppable one-woman army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr Six is accompanied by three circling skulls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr Six is a girlhood hero to Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr Six is a person for whom victory depends on obtaining skulls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr Six crashed through the northern wall of the top floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Estyr Six is the Regent of the North.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Estyr Six is a group whose judgment Shera compares to Meia's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Estyr Six is a historical figure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Estyr Six asked where the Emperor was.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Estyr Six showed no signs of improvement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr is referred to as Estyr Six.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — Estyr Six is a person Cheska Bennett attempted to stop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — An armored Estyr Six flew over to Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Estyr Six uses massive iron spikes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — A pile of wood that had once been a ship was levitating before Estyr Six.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
